hero.subtitle: Experience Indonesia's serenity exactly how it was meant to be. Our AI-driven forecasts help you find the quietest moments at the country's most iconic destinations.

features.title: Built for the way Indonesia moves

density.title: Real-time density tracking
density.desc: Using anonymized satellite data and ground sensors, we provide live occupancy updates for over 200 locations across Indonesia.

forecast.title: 7-day crowd forecasts
forecast.desc: Plan your itinerary with precision. Our machine learning models predict peaks based on tourism trends, local ceremonies, and flight data.

ai.title: AI-powered recommendations
ai.desc: Tailored suggestions that adapt to your style and the current vibe. Wastra guides you to the perfect spot at the perfect time.

destinations.subtitle: Drag, scroll, or swipe to explore Indonesia's most iconic spots. Live data refreshes every five seconds.

live.title: Live Now
live.desc: The archipelago is breathing. Watch live density pulses across Indonesia's hotspots. Green markers indicate optimal visiting times, while amber and red show growing crowds.

landing.scrollText: Wastra is built for the archipelago — quiet mornings in the highlands, sunsets on the coast, and every peaceful corner in between.

cta.title: Ready for a quieter paradise?
cta.subtitle: Join over {{count}} travelers who use Wastra to discover the country's hidden peace.

footer.tagline: Smart tourism platform helping travelers discover Indonesia's quietest moments and authorities manage sustainable visitation.
footer.newsletterDesc: Monthly digest of Indonesia's quietest spots, seasonal forecasts, and product updates.
footer.rights: © 2025 Wastra. Smart Tourism Platform Indonesia. All rights reserved.

home.installBanner: Use the app for faster access
home.installHint: Open browser menu and select "Add to Home Screen"
home.greetingDesc: Check destination crowds before you head out today.
